items.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed on Sunday as Tehran casts doubt on timing
items.summary: The US president's comments come as Iran says an exact date has not been decided.

items.title: Lebanon says three killed in Israeli strike on Beirut suburb
items.summary: Israel says it targeted the Iran-backed Hezbollah, as Tehran warns this could derail a US-Iran deal to end the fighting.

items.title: Swiss voters reject 10 million population cap, early projections say
items.summary: Not all votes have been counted, but the current trend suggests 55% of participants voted against the proposal.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 以色列空襲黎巴嫩首都 川普發文滅火：不該發生
items.summary: 以色列今（14）日再度空襲黎巴嫩首都貝魯特（Beirut），引起伊朗不滿，美國總統川普也發文說，以軍對黎巴嫩的攻擊「不該發生」，他呼籲以色列與其他勢力克制，以免搞砸了有望簽署的美...…

items.title: 鞏固強人形象秀Man力 川普辦格鬥賽慶80大壽
items.summary: 美國總統川普14日過80大壽，將在白宮舉行格鬥賽慶生；美國有線電視新聞網（CNN）說，此等奇特的過壽方式，意在幫年事已高、男子氣概形象不復以往的川普，重振man力。  報導...…

items.title: 俄議員連番砲轟普廷無能 要求提烏克蘭終戰計畫
items.summary: 英國「每日電訊報」報導，由於烏克蘭戰爭陷入僵局，愈來愈多俄羅斯公眾人物打破官方禁令，公開對總統普廷（Vladimir Putin）表達不滿。1名俄羅斯國會議員近日公開砲轟克里...…
